issue.title: Adopt WPHX PHP as primary compiler focus

artifacts.role: oracle review prompt bundle for future stock-target abandonment or full-backend claims
compiler operations guidance linked to ADR-016
program rollup records compiler-focus shift without score movement
agent instruction update for WPHX PHP adoption posture
operations copy of agent instruction update

claims: WPHX PHP compiler usability is now the near-term focus for new WordPress public PHP emission and compiler-shape gaps.
Stock Haxe PHP remains a bounded private-output/stdphp oracle, not the architecture to optimize around for public WordPress files.
The WPHX-COMP-PHP-USABLE epic owns the first gates before broad Core PHP port work resumes in parallel.
True PHP output gaps should move into WPHX PHP core IR, runtime/std strategy, or WordPress profile constraints instead of Haxe source contortions or runner patching.
non_claims: This receipt does not claim WPHX PHP is already a full arbitrary-Haxe PHP backend.
This receipt does not claim stock Haxe PHP can be removed today.
This receipt does not claim new PHP lowering functionality.
This receipt does not claim installed WordPress functionality or runtime parity.
This receipt does not move the super-progress score.
